page.title: Seaduced Experience | Private Boat Tours Copenhagen
page.description: Discover Copenhagen from the water with a private and intimate boat experience. Cruise through scenic canals, uncover hidden corners of the city, and enjoy a relaxed tour guided by locals who know Copenhagen best.

bespoke.text: Looking for something unique? From corporate events to romantic surprises, we specialize in tailoring private cruises. Contact us today for a personalized offer and custom quote.

why.label: Why Choose Us
why.title:
A More Personal Way to
Experience Copenhagen
why.p1: At Seaduced Experience, we believe the best way to discover Copenhagen is from the water. Our tours are private, relaxed, and designed to feel personal from beginning to end.
why.p2: Instead of crowded tourist boats, we offer small and intimate experiences that let you enjoy the canals at your own pace. Every route is guided by locals who share stories, hidden spots, and a more authentic side of the city.

private.title: Private and Personalized
private.text: Your tour is reserved only for your group, without crowds or strangers on board.

guides.title: Local Expert Guides
guides.text: Our guides know Copenhagen's canals, landmarks, and hidden corners, and bring each route to life with local stories.

routes.title: Scenic Hidden Routes
routes.text: We explore beautiful waterways and charming areas that many larger tours miss.

comfort.title: Comfort and Atmosphere
comfort.text: From summer cruises to winter hygge moments, every detail is designed to make the experience relaxed and memorable.

reviews.label: Guest Reviews
reviews.title: What Our Guests Say

anna.text: "Best private boat tour in Copenhagen. Cozy, personal and unforgettable experience."
anna.author: — Anna, Germany

mark.text: "Amazing private canal tour. Way better than big tourist boats."
mark.author: — Mark, USA

lucia.text: "Perfect hygge experience on the water. Highly recommended."
lucia.author: — Lucia, Spain

tcard.dawn: This tour was one of the highlights of our trip! Our guide Oni's knowledge of the canals and history was outstanding, and he even recommended a delicious meal at Reffen.
tcard.laura: Our guide Oni was terrific – he tailored the tour just for us. This was a wonderful family-friendly experience, and we highly recommend it.
tcard.oliver: A perfect afternoon exploring Copenhagen from the canals. Beautiful views and insightful stories – highly recommended!
tcard.karina: Perfect Sunday visiting Copenhagen from the canals. We had the best guide we could wish. Highly recommended!
tcard.shannon: This was a great tour!! He was an amazing guide and provided great information while also being fun.
tcard.thomas: We had a fantastic trip with Oni. He told us all about Copenhagen, saw all of the sites, had some great food at the Reffen stop, and most importantly had a lot of laughs.

reviews.more_sub: Want to see more reviews from our guests? Visit our GetYourGuide page to explore detailed feedback from travelers like you.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.sub: Everything you need to know before your tour.

availability.q: Are the tours private and available year-round?
availability.a: Yes. Every Seaduced Experience tour is 100% private, reserved only for your group. We operate year-round, and our tours are designed to offer a warm and cozy hygge experience even in the colder months.

route.q: What is the route and how long are the tours?
route.a: Our tours typically last 1 to 2 hours, with options up to 4 hours. We explore central canals (Nyhavn, Christianshavn, Islands Brygge) and can include stops at Reffen or Trekroner Fort on longer trips. As everything is private, your captain can customize the route to your interests.

amenities.q: What is included and what should we bring?
amenities.a: We provide blankets and hot drinks in winter, and cold water in summer. Some packages include snacks or champagne. You are welcome to bring your own food/drinks for trips of 3+ hours. We recommend comfortable clothing and layers for the weather.

policies.a:
Payments: We accept Credit/Debit cards (Visa, MC, AMEX), MobilePay, Apple Pay, SumUp, and Revolut.

Cancellations:

  • 7+ days before: Full refund.
  • 7 days to 48h before: 50% refund.
  • Within 48h: Non-refundable.

In case of bad weather/unsafe conditions, we reschedule or offer a full refund. Refunds take 5–10 business days.

meetingpoint.a: Meeting point details are shared after booking confirmation.

page.title: City Highlights | Seaduced Experience
page.desc: Discover Copenhagen’s highlights on a 1-hour private boat tour with your own captain. Enjoy music, drinks, and panoramic views of the city from the water.

city_highlights.intro: Discover Copenhagen’s main highlights on a 1-hour private boat tour with your own local captain. Cruise through the canals, enjoy music and drinks on board, and take in the city’s most iconic landmarks from the water — all at a relaxed, comfortable pace.
story_paras: This 1-hour private boat tour is the perfect way to experience Copenhagen from the water in a short time. You’ll cruise through the city’s canals and harbor while your captain shares local stories and points out key landmarks along the way.

During the tour, you’ll pass by some of Copenhagen’s most iconic sights, including Islands Brygge, the modern harbor of Amager, the Black Diamond library, Christiansborg Palace, Nyhavn, the Opera House, Christianshavn canals, and the Church of Our Saviour.

This is a relaxed sightseeing cruise — no stops — designed to give you a complete overview of the city from the water while enjoying your own music, drinks, and private atmosphere on board the Joda Tender 710.
Note: The Little Mermaid and Reffen are not included in the 1-hour route.
highlights: City Highlights: See Copenhagen’s main landmarks from the water.
Private Experience: Only your group and your captain on board.
Local Guide: Discover stories and hidden details of the city.
Relaxed Cruise: Enjoy music, drinks, and panoramic views.
Perfect in 1 Hour: A complete overview of Copenhagen in a short time.
included: Live commentary and guiding from captain Oni
Bluetooth speaker for your own music
Drinks available for purchase on board

rules: No jumping or smoking on board
Max 8 guests per booking
Heavy rain: full refund guaranteed

city_highlights.excl_text: Your trip, your vibe: connect your playlist, open a cold drink from the cooler, and cruise in style. This tour offers total flexibility for couples, families, or small groups.

page.title: Harbor Extended and Reffen Stop | Seaduced Experience
page.desc: Experience Copenhagen on an extended 3-hour harbor tour. Includes city highlights plus a stop at Reffen street food market, music, and drinks on board.

reffen_3h.intro: Explore Copenhagen beyond the highlights on a 3-hour private boat experience with your own captain. Cruise through the canals, stop at Reffen street food market, enjoy music and drinks on board, and experience the city at your own pace — relaxed, flexible, and fully private.
story_paras: This 3-hour private boat tour is the perfect balance between sightseeing and experience. You’ll explore Copenhagen’s canals and harbor in depth, while having time to stop, relax, and truly enjoy the city from the water.

Along the way, you’ll pass by some of the city’s most iconic landmarks, including Islands Brygge, the Black Diamond, Christiansborg Palace, Nyhavn, the Opera House, Christianshavn, and the Church of Our Saviour — all while your captain shares local stories and insights.

Unlike shorter tours, this experience gives you time to slow down. You can stop at Reffen street food market, one of Copenhagen’s most vibrant spots, where you can enjoy food from around the world either on land or back on the boat.
There’s also flexibility to pause for a swim, relax with a drink, or enjoy your own music on board the Joda Tender 710.
The route can also include a visit to the Little Mermaid.
This is your time on the water — flexible, private, and designed entirely around your vibe.
highlights: City + Experience: Go beyond highlights with time to stop and explore
Reffen Stop: Visit Copenhagen’s famous street food market
Swim Option: Optional swimming in the harbor
Little Mermaid: Visit one of Denmark’s most iconic landmarks
Fully Private: Your group, your music, your pace
included: Live commentary and guiding from captain Oni
Bluetooth speaker for your own music
Drinks available for purchase on board

rules: No jumping or smoking on board
Max 8 guests per booking
Heavy rain: full refund guaranteed
Food at Reffen is not included in the price

page.title: Sea Fortress and Coastal Journey | Seaduced Experience
page.desc: Experience the ultimate Copenhagen coastal journey. Includes city highlights, Reffen street food market, the Little Mermaid, and a private sail to the historic Trekroner Fort.

sea_fortress_4h.intro: Experience the ultimate Copenhagen boat tour on a 4-hour private journey with your own captain. Cruise through the canals, stop at Reffen street food market, visit the Little Mermaid, and sail into open water to explore the historic Trekroner Fort — all at your own pace, fully private.
story_paras: This 4-hour private boat tour is the full Copenhagen experience. You’ll explore the city’s canals and harbor in depth, with time to stop, relax, and go beyond the typical routes.

Along the way, you’ll pass by major landmarks such as Islands Brygge, the Black Diamond, Christiansborg Palace, Nyhavn, the Opera House, Christianshavn, and the Church of Our Saviour — while your captain shares local stories and insights.
You’ll have the opportunity to stop at Reffen street food market, where you can enjoy food from around the world in a vibrant waterfront setting.
The journey continues with a visit to the Little Mermaid, one of Denmark’s most iconic landmarks.

From there, you’ll sail beyond the city into open water to reach Trekroner Fort — a historic sea fortress built to defend Copenhagen, offering panoramic views and a unique perspective that few visitors experience.
You can also take time to swim, relax, enjoy drinks, or play your own music on board the Joda Tender 710.
This is the most complete, flexible, and immersive way to experience Copenhagen from the water.
highlights: Full Experience: The most complete Copenhagen boat tour
Reffen Stop: Enjoy Copenhagen’s street food scene
Little Mermaid: Visit Denmark’s most iconic landmark
Trekroner Fort: Sail into open water to a historic sea fortress
Swim and Relax: Time to enjoy the water and atmosphere
Fully Private: Your group, your music, your pace
included: Live commentary and guiding from captain Oni
Bluetooth speaker for your own music

page.title: Floating Wine Tasting Boat Experience | Seaduced Experience
page.desc: Enjoy a 2-hour private boat tour in Copenhagen with a guided wine tasting experience. Includes 4 wines, a gourmet cheese and charcuterie board, and a relaxed, premium atmosphere on the water.

wine_tasting.intro: Enjoy a unique 2-hour private boat experience in Copenhagen combining sightseeing with a guided wine tasting. Relax on the water with your own captain and host, taste four carefully selected wines, and enjoy a gourmet board while cruising through the city’s canals.
story_paras: Enjoy Copenhagen from the water on a 2-hour private canal cruise combined with a guided wine tasting experience.

While your captain navigates through the city’s most scenic canals and harbor areas, your onboard host will guide you through a curated tasting of four selected wines, explaining their origin, notes, and characteristics.
To complement the tasting, a gourmet board is served on board, including quality cheeses, cured meats, and fresh bread.
The atmosphere is relaxed, elegant, and intimate — ideal for couples, friends, small celebrations, or travelers looking for a premium experience beyond a traditional sightseeing tour.
This is a fully private experience for your group only, designed to combine great views, great wine, and a calm, exclusive setting on the water.
highlights: Guided Wine Tasting: Taste 4 selected wines
Gourmet Board: Cheese, charcuterie, and bread included
Private Experience: Only your group on board
Premium Atmosphere: Relaxed, elegant, and intimate
Perfect for Celebrations: Ideal for couples and special occasions

rules: This is a private experience for your group only
Minimum age: 18 years (alcohol served)
Route may vary depending on weather and harbor conditions
Follow captain’s safety instructions at all times
In unsafe weather conditions, the tour may be rescheduled

page.title: Private Boat and Land Tour in Copenhagen, Dragør and Kronborg | Seaduced Experience
page.desc: Experience Copenhagen by water and land on a 5-hour private tour. Enjoy a canal cruise, visit Dragør village, and explore Helsingør with views of Kronborg Castle — with optional tapas and wine.

land_tour.hero_html: Copenhagen Private Boat and Land Experience
land_tour.intro: Discover Copenhagen from two unique perspectives — water and land. Start with a private canal cruise, then continue by vehicle to explore Dragør and Helsingør, including views of the iconic Kronborg Castle. A complete, premium experience combining comfort, culture, and exploration.
story_paras: Experience Copenhagen beyond the typical tour by combining a private canal cruise with a land journey through some of Denmark’s most charming and historic locations.
Begin with a 2-hour private boat tour through Copenhagen’s canals, passing iconic landmarks while enjoying a relaxed and exclusive atmosphere on the water.
After the cruise, continue your experience in a premium 7-seat vehicle with driver, heading outside the city.
Your first stop is Dragør, a picturesque coastal village known for its traditional houses and historic harbor. Stroll through its charming streets and enjoy the peaceful atmosphere.
Next, travel to Helsingør, where you’ll admire the exterior of Kronborg Castle — the famous setting of Shakespeare’s Hamlet — located right on the coast.
During the experience, you can also enjoy Spanish tapas with wine, with the option to upgrade to champagne for a more exclusive touch.
This experience is designed for travelers who want to combine sightseeing, comfort, and culture in one seamless journey.
highlights: Water + Land Experience: Explore Copenhagen from two perspectives
Private Canal Cruise: 2-hour boat tour through the city
Dragør Village: Walk through a historic coastal town
Kronborg Castle: See the famous Hamlet castle from outside
Premium Comfort: Travel in a private high-end vehicle
Optional Tapas and Wine: Upgrade your experience
included: Land tour to Dragør and Helsingør

rules: This is a private experience
Route may vary depending on weather and traffic
Follow guide and driver instructions
Tapas and wine can be upgraded to champagne

excl_items: Not suitable for people over 150 kg
Not suitable for people prone to seasickness

page.title: Private Boat Tour from Copenhagen to Malmö | Seaduced Experience
page.desc: Cruise from Copenhagen to Malmö on a private boat tour. Explore city landmarks, cross the Øresund Strait, and enjoy free time in Sweden — all in one unique full-day experience.

malmo.hero_html: Copenhagen to Malmö Private Boat Experience
malmo.intro: Discover two countries in one unforgettable day. Cruise from Copenhagen to Malmö on a private boat, explore iconic landmarks from the water, cross the Øresund Strait, and enjoy free time in Sweden — all at your own pace with your own captain.
story_paras: Begin your journey in Copenhagen, cruising through the city’s vibrant harbor and passing some of its most iconic landmarks. From the colorful Nyhavn to the modern Opera House and the Black Diamond, enjoy a unique perspective of the Danish capital from the water.

As the city fades behind you, the experience transforms. You’ll cross the Øresund Strait, leaving the harbor for open sea. With music playing, drinks on board, and endless views of the horizon, this part of the journey becomes a true private escape.

Arriving in Malmö, Sweden, you’ll have around two hours of free time to explore at your own pace. Walk through the charming old town, enjoy lunch by the waterfront, or simply experience a second Scandinavian city.
After your visit, return to the boat and cruise back to Copenhagen, enjoying the calm rhythm of the sea and the relaxed atmosphere on board.
This is not just a boat tour — it’s a cross-border experience combining sightseeing, exploration, and open-water adventure.
highlights: Two Countries in One Day: Denmark → Sweden
City Highlights: See Copenhagen from the water
Open Sea Crossing: Sail across the Øresund Strait
Malmö Visit: Free time to explore at your own pace
Drinks and Music: Relax on board during the journey
Fully Private: Your group, your experience

bring: Passport or valid ID (required for border crossing)
rules: Valid ID required (travel between Denmark and Sweden)
Route depends on weather and sea conditions
Crossing is only possible if conditions are safe
Full refund if canceled due to weather conditions
Follow captain’s safety instructions at all times
